title: With our managed databases, you can focus on your applications
description1: Harness the power of your data by maintaining control of your resources.
description2: Choose the right database engine for you from our wide range, and deploy it in minutes. We manage the infrastructure and administration of your managed services.
description3: You save time, money, and are able to focus on your developments and the value your applications bring to your customers.
cardGuidesContent: Find all the guides and tutorials for our managed databases
cardQuickStartContent: Find out how to quickly install your first managed database
cardFreeTierTescription: Try the MongoDB solution for free
cardFreeTierContent: Get a managed MongoDB cluster for free, for life
databases.title: Instead, develop your databases rather than worrying about them.
databases.subtitle: With our fully managed databases, free yourself from administrative constraints and focus on your applications and products.
databases.description1: SQL, NoSQL, or caching: we have the solution. Deploy your preferred database engine in minutes with our range of managed solutions: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, and Valkey.
databases.description2: Our teams manage the infrastructure, backups, and monitoring so you can focus on developing high-performance applications, not on server maintenance.
databases.description3: Moreover, start small and easily scale as your data grows, all with predictable pricing, data sovereignty, and built-in high availability.
databases.tile.quickStart.title: Quick Start
databases.tile.documentation.title: Documentation & tutorials
databases.tile.documentation.content: Learn how to quickly deploy your first managed database.
databases.tile.freeTier.title: MongoDB Free Tier
databases.tile.freeTier.content: Enjoy a free managed MongoDB cluster for life.
databases.tile.freeTier.cta: Create your MongoDB instance in two clicks
analytics.title: Transform your data into actionable insights, not sources of problems.
analytics.subtitle: With our fully managed analytics engines, free yourself from administrative constraints and focus on your applications and products.
analytics.description1: Analyze, search, and monitor your data at scale without managing complex infrastructure.
analytics.description2: Deploy Kafka, ClickHouse, OpenSearch, and Grafana in minutes to optimize your data flows, analytics, and observability workloads.
analytics.description3: From dashboards to data pipelines, gain visibility and performance while maintaining complete control and sovereignty over your data.
analytics.tile.quickStart.title: Quick Start
analytics.tile.quickStart.content: Learn to quickly deploy your managed pipelines and dashboards.
analytics.tile.documentation.title: Documentation and tutorials
analytics.tile.documentation.content: Find all the guides and tutorials for our managed Analytics engines
analytics.tile.integrations.title: Integrations
analytics.tile.integrations.content: Easily connect with your databases, Object Storage, or Kubernetes clusters.
